responsibilities: Design and implement novel deep neural network architectures for computer vision and natural language tasks
Train large-scale models on distributed multi-GPU and multi-node clusters using mixed-precision and data parallelism
Optimize and quantize trained models to reduce inference latency and memory footprint for production deployment
Implement and reproduce state-of-the-art research papers, adapting techniques to production-specific constraints
Conduct rigorous experimentation and ablation studies to evaluate architectural and hyperparameter changes
Build and maintain reusable training pipelines and benchmarking infrastructure to accelerate model iteration
Collaborate with research scientists to translate experimental findings into production-ready deep learning systems
Profile and optimize GPU utilization and training throughput to reduce compute costs and training time
Deploy optimized models to edge devices and cloud inference endpoints using ONNX and TensorRT pipelines
Document model architectures, training methodology, and evaluation results for internal knowledge sharing
